name: education digest: the json carries pillars phases new_technology and topics structure
command:
cat > d.jsonl <<'JEOF'
{"source_id":"aws-well-architected","section_id":"s1","pillar":"security","curriculum_phase":"2","delta_class":"best_practice_updated","summary":"IAM update","fetched_at":"2026-06-08T00:00:00Z"}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/curriculum-digest.sh" --deltas d.jsonl --out-dir out --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("out/2026-06-08T120000Z.json","utf8"));const ok=typeof j.pillars==="object" && typeof j.phases==="object" && Array.isArray(j.new_technology) && Array.isArray(j.best_practices_updated) && Array.isArray(j.topics) && j.schema_version;process.exit(ok?0:1)' && echo schema-ok 1>&2
